## Scope and owner

- [ ] Parser / DSL (affects `.metric` syntax)
- [ ] Checks / trust engine
- [ ] Connector (new warehouse or existing one)
- [ ] Reporter / output format
- [ ] CLI / developer ergonomics
- [ ] Docs / examples
